Plugin.name: ToolCupboard
Plugin.Author: imaximum.tech
Plugin.Description: Rust-style base decay for Unturned. Unprotected barricades/structures lose HP over time; buildables inside the radius of a protection device (Claim Flag, powered Generator, Bed, or a configured Custom Item) are healed instead. No UI - all feedback is delivered through chat.

Commands.Command: Check protection status at your position
